title: Medal of Loyalty

The '''Medal of Loyalty''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] medal awarded for [[Battle for Honor|successfully hunting down and capturing]] the traitor [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]].

==Design==
The ribbon was primarily blue with a red stripe at the middle. The medal itself was gold colored and wedge-shaped with an opening at the bottom. There were also two lines on each side, and it possessed a blue triangular center with silver linings.

==Known recipients==
[[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], who received this medal after completing his fifth tour of duty.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
